case_title: FB LIMITED, A CALIF LIMITED PARTNERSHIP vs. MEHOLIC, DEBORAH ANN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FB LIMITED, A CALIF LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT MEHOLIC, DEBORAH ANN DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MEHOLIC, DEBORAH ANN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT MEHOLIC, DEBORAH ANN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-15-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MEHOLIC, DEBORAH ANN

THIS JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. DEFENDANT, DEBORA ANN MEHOLIC SHALL VACATE 438 BROADWAY STREET, ROOM 20 BY 6-6-95. PLAINTIFF F.B LIMITED SHALL PAY DEFENDANT MEHOLIC $300 ON 5-31-95. EACH PARTY SHALL DROP ALL CLAIMS AGAINST EACH OTHER. IF DEFENDANT MEHOLIC MOVES BEFORE 6-6-95, PLAINTIFF WILL GIVE HER $300 IMMEDIATELY. IF DEFENDANT MEHOLIC DOES NOT MOVE BY 6-6-95, PLAINTIFF SHALL MOVE FOR A WRIT OF POSSESSION AND $1,885.00 IN RENT FROM 8-12-94 THROUGH 3-10-95 AND ACCRUED RENT UP TO 6-6-95.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT MEHOLIC, DEBORAH ANN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MEHOLIC, DEBORAH ANN
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FB LIMITED, A CALIF LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-22-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
